message:
🐛 Fix Copilot CLI provider empty response in AI Missions (#1458)

The CopilotCLIProvider was returning empty responses when used through
AI Missions because it only implemented AIProvider (non-streaming).
The server's handleChatMessageStreaming falls back to Chat() for
non-StreamingProvider agents, which was not delivering chunks to the
frontend WebSocket.

Changes:
- Implement StreamingProvider interface (StreamChatWithProgress) for
  real-time chunk delivery to the frontend via WebSocket
- Add --silent flag to suppress usage stats noise
- Add --no-ask-user flag to prevent interactive prompt blocking
- Add --no-color flag for clean output
- Capture stderr for diagnostic logging on failures
- Add structured logging (prompt length, PID, line/byte counts)
- Return error with stderr content when CLI fails silently
- Fix version parsing (trailing dot in version string)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andrew.anderson@ibm.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
